what: Inline cktile_moe_stage1 for ksplit path + inline ck_moe_stage1 and flydsl_stage2 for CK 2-stage path: eliminate Python functools.partial dispatch overhead and pre-allocate cktile tmp_out/out buffers
why: v174 from session 45 was never tested. The cktile path allocates torch.zeros + torch.empty on every call. Inlining stage1_fwd and flydsl_stage2 removes partial() call overhead and dict lookups. Combined savings estimated 2-4us per shape.

what: Use 1-stage fmoe_g1u1 kernel for ksplit=0 shapes: single kernel does quant+gate_up_GEMM+SwiGLU+down_GEMM+reduction, eliminating inter-stage bf16->fp4 requantization round-trip and second kernel launch
why: Current 2-stage path for 4/7 shapes has costly inter-stage requantization (bf16->fp4) between stage1 and stage2. The 1-stage fmoe_g1u1 kernel is listed in gfx950 fused_moe_1stage_dict for our exact problem type (Silu, per_1x32, bf16, fp4x2, fp4x2). Eliminates ~2 kernel launches + global memory round-trip.

what: Use FlyDSL stage1 kernel (afp4_wfp4_bf16 tile_m=32/64 tile_n=256 tile_k=256) for ksplit=0 CK 2-stage shapes, replacing CK ck_moe_stage1_fwd. FlyDSL may have better wave scheduling for these shapes.
why: CK stage1 uses fixed 4-WG 256x128x128x128 or 256x32x128x128 configs. FlyDSL stage1 has different tile shapes (up to 256 tile_n/tile_k) and may achieve higher throughput for the GEMM1 compute. Both use the same weight format (pre-shuffled fp4x2).

what: Force cktile ksplit=2 for all 7 shapes by setting ksplit=2 in custom configs for the 4 CK 2-stage shapes (E=33 bs=128/512/512 and E=257 bs=512). Eliminates inter-stage bf16->fp4 requantization round-trip.
why: The 4 CK 2-stage shapes spend time on inter-stage requantization (bf16->fp4). The cktile path keeps activations in bf16 throughout, eliminating this overhead. Even though cktile uses bf16 instead of fp4 for intermediate compute, the savings from eliminating quant may outweigh reduced GEMM throughput.

what_failed: Tried 5 approaches: (1) inline cktile+stage1+stage2 calls (v176: +0.9%), (2) 1-stage fmoe_g1u1 ASM kernel (v178/v179: timeout from ASM compilation + correctness issues with scale formats), (3) FlyDSL stage1 for ksplit=0 shapes (v181: compiler bug in mixed_moe_gemm1), (4) cktile ksplit=2 for all shapes (v183: +46.7% regression, bf16 activations 2x slower than fp4), (5) unshuffled weight variants for 1-stage.
